hypothesis: If a closed-loop Bayesian optimization platform autonomously explores the multidimensional parameter space of reactive carbon electrolyzers, then it will identify non-intuitive combinations of bicarbonate concentration, temperature, flow rate, KOH concentration, and applied current density that achieve higher CO2 reduction reactor yields than those found through conventional researcher-guided experimentation, because machine learning–driven sequential design efficiently navigates complex, nonlinear interactions among operating variables that are intractable to human intuition alone.
